rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces district property tax revenue, which directly affects the cost-share calculation under Subsection (b) based on taxes imposed. No statutory amendment needed, but commissioner rules may require updates to reflect adjusted calculations.
quote: the dollar amount of maintenance and debt service taxes imposed by the district for that year
_note: Indirect fiscal interaction: statute self-adjusts to actual tax amounts but increased exemption lowers district revenue feeding the §30.003(b) formula. Subsection (f-1) also references §§48.255 and 48.2551, which interact with homestead exemptions in school finance.
